theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X}
    (h : P2 (X := X) A) : P3 (X := X) A := by
  dsimp [P2] at h
  dsimp [P3]
  intro x hx
  have hx' : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := h hx
  have h_subset : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A := by
    exact closure_mono Set.interior_subset
  exact (interior_mono h_subset) hx'

theorem Topology.P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 (X := X) A → P1 (X := X) A := by
  intro hP2
  have hstep : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) := by
    simpa using (interior_subset (s := closure (interior A)))
  exact Set.Subset.trans hP2 hstep
